ac: AC1: shared validator enforces rules a-e

ac: AC2: observable default-on + justification + UI heuristic
evidence: Fixture case 4: observable:false on UI-sounding AC text blocked by heuristic; default-true path verified in case 1.

ac: AC3: /groom state sweep runs validator over review issues
evidence: groom.md step 4 runs `node ~/.claude/hooks/lib/verify-witness.js {N}`; CLI exits 0 valid / 1 invalid (verified).

ac: AC4: gate matches review-flip robustly + extracts N
evidence: Hook cases: unquoted+reordered flags blocked; in-review substring NOT matched (exit0); URL/#N/positional all parsed.

ac: AC5: engage only for ILR flips; fail-closed; escape hatch
evidence: No-tracking-dir passthrough=exit0; unparseable N=exit2; CATALINA_WITNESS_ALLOW=1 -> exit0 with loud bypass notice.

ac: AC6: witnessed each rule via real hook invocations
evidence: 6 validator cases + 10 hook cases run as real invocations; all exit codes + messages match spec.

ac: AC7: witness.md schema + closed escape hatches + HALT
observable_reason: doc change; the witness mechanism concerns browsers but this AC has no UI of its own
evidence: witness.md updated: schema block (observable/artifact), pass+method:none banned, needs_human names action, HALT when no browser.

ac: AC8: separate Feynman subagent w/ claude-in-chrome tools
observable_reason: doc change; describes browser tooling but is itself a doc edit with no UI
evidence: witness.md step 3 spawns Feynman subagent, mandates mcp__claude-in-chrome__* grant + HALT if unavailable. Runtime exercised only on a real UI issue.

ac: AC9: auto-wire settings.json + self-check + accurate docs
evidence: settings.json wiring tested idempotent + merge-preserving (existing hook + model kept); witness.md step-0 self-check added; ilr-system Guardrail 3 rewritten accurately.
node --check passes both JS files; bash -n install.sh passes; witness.md retains premortem-vs-actual, programmatic, and gemba/browser steps.
install.sh now idempotently wires witness-gate into settings.json (tested); witness.md step-0 self-checks.

evidence: /groom state sweep revalidates every review issue regardless of label-set path; gate documented as defense-in-depth.
witness.md mandates the tool grant + HALT, but the subagent-spawn is not exercised on a real UI issue this session — verify on the next UI witness.
default-observable + required reason + UI keyword heuristic (fixture case 4 blocked it); classification assigned by independent subagent.

evidence: validator requires >1KB and non-identical SHA1 across observable ACs (verified in module logic + fixtures).
